tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall address
edit "RFC1918_10"
set subnet 10.0.0.0 255.0.0.0
next
edit "RFC1918_172"
set subnet 172.16.0.0 255.240.0.0
next
edit "RFC1918_192"
set subnet 192.168.0.0 255.255.0.0
next
end
config firewall addrgrp
edit "RFC1918_ALL"
set member "RFC1918_10" "RFC1918_172" "RFC1918_192"
next
end
config firewall policy
edit 4
set name "block_spoofing_wan_to_lan"
set srcintf "port1"
set dstintf "port2"
set srcaddr "RFC1918_ALL"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "ALL"
set logtraffic all
next
end
show firewall policy
"}

tool_calls.content:

config firewall policy
    edit 1
        set name "block_icmp_internal_to_wan"
        set uuid a52a0f56-1612-51f1-3f57-09d06c065067
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "LAN_SUBNET"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "PING"
        set logtraffic all
    next
    edit 2
        set name "allow_lan_to_wan"
        set uuid 11d683a2-216f-51f1-2b44-466f1d007ee9
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "LAN_SUBNET"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic all
    next
edit 3
        set name "deny_nonlan_to_wan"
        set uuid 11e1de96-216f-51f1-6a19-0ae12bcd43ea
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic all
    next
    edit 4
        set name "block_spoofing_wan_to_lan"
        set uuid 72142260-216f-51f1-d419-9dcbd1e21fac
        set srcintf "port1"
        set dstintf "port2"
        set srcaddr "RFC1918_ALL"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end
